description: Novel Prep Math I / Enhanced Math I Placement — full online diagnostic: 50 MCQ + 4 graphing + 11 free response from Placement_Enhanced_Math_1.tex.

brand.report_title: Math I / Enhanced Math I placement report
brand.trust_line: Score bands follow the printed Novel Prep Math I / Enhanced Math I placement guide (50-item MC key; full paper includes graphing and free response).
brand.trust_line_zh: 分数区间与纸质《Math I / Enhanced Math I 分班测试》官方说明一致（在线为 50 道选择题；纸质卷另含作图与解答题）。

score_band_rubric.title: Below Math I readiness
score_band_rubric.headline: Build core algebra fluency before Math I.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 建议先巩固核心代数，再进入 Math I。
score_band_rubric.summary: Matches the printed guide for students who need remediation on equations, inequalities, slope, and function basics before entering Math I.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: 与官方说明一致：需在方程、不等式、斜率与函数基础方面系统补强后再进入 Math I。
highlights: Focus on integer and rational operations, linear equations, and graphing lines.
Use Parts A–B misses as a targeted review list.
Re-take after a focused unit to confirm growth.

score_band_rubric.title: Borderline Math I
score_band_rubric.headline: Close to Math I — targeted support recommended.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 接近 Math I 门槛，建议带支持进入或短期强化。
score_band_rubric.summary: Aligned with the borderline Math I band on the printed two-gate protocol (Gate 1). Strengthen linear models, function notation, and systems before accelerating.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: 与官方 Gate 1 边缘区间一致：建议加强一次函数、函数记号与方程组后再加速。
highlights: Review MC 1–30 misses, especially equations, slope, and function vs. non-function.
Consider Math I with structured support rather than skipping prerequisites.
Paper graphing and free-response sections add context for final placement.

score_band_rubric.title: Math I ready
score_band_rubric.headline: Qualified for Math I; Enhanced Math I not yet secure.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 可进入 Math I；Enhanced Math I 尚需加强。
score_band_rubric.summary: Gate 1 Math I readiness is likely secure on MC items. Enhanced Math I signals (Part C) still need growth before honors/accelerated placement.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: 选择题表现支持 Math I 起点；Enhanced 相关能力（Part C）仍需提升。
highlights: Assign Part C review: radicals, systems, transformations, coordinate geometry.
Use the full paper test (graphing + FR) before Enhanced placement decisions.
Gate 2 on the printed key requires strong Part C plus constructed response work.

score_band_rubric.title: Borderline Enhanced Math I
score_band_rubric.headline: Near Enhanced Math I readiness — polish reasoning and Part C.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 接近 Enhanced Math I；建议强化 Part C 与说理。
score_band_rubric.summary: Matches the printed borderline Enhanced band. Student shows substantial Math I mastery with emerging Enhanced signals; short targeted prep may close the gap.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: 与官方 Enhanced 边缘区间一致：Math I 较扎实，Enhanced 信号已出现但尚需巩固。
highlights: Target Part C misses: proof reasoning, coordinate geometry, nonlinear systems.
Review graphing and free-response items on the paper test for Gate 2.
Discuss honors pacing with the school using this report plus class performance.

score_band_rubric.title: Enhanced Math I ready
score_band_rubric.headline: Strong Math I and Enhanced Math I readiness on this MC diagnostic.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 在本套选择题诊断上达到 Enhanced Math I 准备度。
score_band_rubric.summary: Top band on the printed MC key — strong Part A–C performance. Confirm with paper graphing/FR and Gate 2 protocol before final Enhanced Math I placement.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: 与官方 MC 最高档一致：Part A–C 表现突出；最终分班仍建议结合纸质作图/解答题与 Gate 2。
highlights: Maintain depth through mixed review and explanation-quality practice.
Use any missed items for precision tuning, not re-teaching entire units.
Coordinate with school counselors for Integrated/Enhanced track scheduling.

rubric.title: Below Math I readiness
rubric.summary: Percent fallback: focus on core algebra remediation.

rubric.title: Math I ready
rubric.summary: Percent fallback: Math I track; build Enhanced signals.

rubric.title: Enhanced Math I ready
rubric.summary: Percent fallback: strong overall MC performance.
